villagediplomacy.bell.brave_ring: §6[%s] *rings the bell furiously* DANGER! EVERYONE TO THE SQUARE!
villagediplomacy.cmd.error.no_village_ne: §cNo village within 200 blocks. Stand closer to a village.
villagediplomacy.cmd.name_need_village: §cYou must be inside a village to name it!
villagediplomacy.dialog.become_ally: You are now considered an ally of our village!
villagediplomacy.dialog.become_enemy: You are now considered an enemy of our village!
villagediplomacy.dialog.friendly.0: Our village is glad to have your support!
villagediplomacy.dialog.friendly.1: We trust you, friend. Come back anytime.
villagediplomacy.dialog.friendly.2: Thanks to you, our village thrives.
villagediplomacy.dialog.friendly.3: You are always welcome at our hearths.
villagediplomacy.dialog.friendly.4: The children speak of your deeds with admiration.
villagediplomacy.dialog.friendly.5: Trade fair, friend, and our doors stay open for you.
villagediplomacy.dialog.friendly.6: The golems nod when you pass. That means something.
villagediplomacy.dialog.greeting.0: Hello, traveler. Welcome to our village.
villagediplomacy.dialog.greeting.1: Good to see you around here.
villagediplomacy.dialog.greeting.2: What brings you to our lands?
villagediplomacy.dialog.greeting.4: The elders still speak of travelers who helped us long ago.
villagediplomacy.dialog.greeting.5: Mind the path—wolves get bold at dusk.
villagediplomacy.dialog.greeting.6: If you're hungry, the baker might spare a loaf.
villagediplomacy.dialog.hostile.3: We remember what you did. Be gone!
villagediplomacy.dialog.hostile.4: Iron remembers every blow you've dealt here.
villagediplomacy.dialog.hostile.5: One more misstep and the meeting bell rings for you alone.
villagediplomacy.dialog.neutral.0: We neither trust nor distrust you... yet.
villagediplomacy.dialog.neutral.2: Our village remains cautious around outsiders.
villagediplomacy.dialog.neutral.3: Trade fairly and we shall get along.
villagediplomacy.dialog.neutral.4: We've seen heroes and villains wear the same cloak.
villagediplomacy.dialog.neutral.5: Keep your sword sheathed unless the raid horn sounds.
villagediplomacy.dialog.quest.0: Could you help us recover something stolen?
villagediplomacy.dialog.quest.1: We need a brave soul for a dangerous task.
villagediplomacy.dialog.quest.2: If you prove your worth, we will reward you well.
villagediplomacy.dialog.quest.3: Bring back three strings from spiders—we'll weave new nets.
villagediplomacy.dialog.quest.4: The river ran cloudy this morning. Could you look upstream?
villagediplomacy.dialog.reputation_down: Your reputation with our village has decreased.
villagediplomacy.dialog.reputation_up: Your reputation with our village has improved!
villagediplomacy.dialog.trade.0: Looking to trade? I have fine goods.
villagediplomacy.dialog.trade.1: A fair deal benefits us both.
villagediplomacy.dialog.trade.2: I might have something useful for you.
villagediplomacy.dialog.trade.3: These prices are the best in the region!
villagediplomacy.dialog.trade.4: Come, let us see what we can arrange.
villagediplomacy.dialog.trade.5: Emeralds don't lie—neither do my prices.
villagediplomacy.dialog.warning.0: Be careful, dark creatures roam nearby.
villagediplomacy.dialog.warning.1: We heard strange noises last night...
villagediplomacy.dialog.warning.3: Our village has been under attack recently.
villagediplomacy.dialog.warning.4: Light a torch before the cellar—something skitters down there.
villagediplomacy.dialog.warning.5: The cartographer marks a ruin to the north. Tread carefully.
villagediplomacy.gift.shepherd: §f[Shepherd] The softest wool in the region!
villagediplomacy.golem.danger.0: §c[%s] You have made yourself an enemy of this village!
villagediplomacy.golem.danger.2: §c[%s] Your crimes will not go unpunished!
villagediplomacy.golem.forgive.many: §a✓ The village iron guardians have forgiven you. (§7%s guardians§a)
villagediplomacy.golem.forgive.one: §a✓ An iron guardian has forgiven you.
villagediplomacy.golem.loyalty_line.devo: §6[%s] I will protect this village with my life!
villagediplomacy.golem.loyalty_line.inde: §b[%s] I protect those who deserve it.
villagediplomacy.golem.story.0: Created during a zombie siege to protect %s
villagediplomacy.golem.story.1: Forged by the village blacksmith in ancient times
villagediplomacy.golem.story.2: Awakened when the village was in grave danger
villagediplomacy.golem.story.3: Built by the elders to guard the village gates
villagediplomacy.golem.story.4: Formed from iron donated by grateful traders
villagediplomacy.golem.story.5: Created during a great celebration of peace
villagediplomacy.golem.story.6: Raised to honor a fallen hero of the village
villagediplomacy.golem.strike.violent.2: §c[%s] You're making it worse for yourself!
villagediplomacy.golem.strike.violent.3: §4[%s] I WILL CRUSH YOU FOR THIS!
villagediplomacy.golem.strike.violent.6: §c[%s] YOU'LL PAY FOR EVERY VILLAGER YOU HURT!
villagediplomacy.golem.strike.warn1.6: §e[%s] Don't make me come over there.
villagediplomacy.golem.strike.warn1.8: §e[%s] These villagers are under MY protection.
villagediplomacy.golem.strike.warn2.4: §6[%s] You don't want to test me!
villagediplomacy.golem.strike.warn2.7: §6[%s] Back away or face the consequences!
villagediplomacy.golem.strike.warn2.9: §6[%s] One more hit and you're DONE!
villagediplomacy.golem.title: %s §7(%s§7)
villagediplomacy.personality.flee.cautio: §e[%s] I should get out of here...
villagediplomacy.personality.gift_bread: §a[%s] Here—take this bread. You look hurt.
villagediplomacy.personality.title: §6【 %s 】
villagediplomacy.react.animalattack.came: §c[Villager] That camel is our desert transport!
§c[Villager] Stop! We need that camel for travel!
§c[Villager] We use those camels for desert routes!
§c[Baby Villager] Camels are for the desert!
villagediplomacy.react.animalattack.chic: §c[Villager] Stop! That chicken is our breakfast!
§c[Villager] That chicken is part of our farm!
§c[Baby Villager] That chicken gives us eggs!
§c[Baby Villager] I collect eggs from them!
§c[Villager] Stop! That cow provides milk for the village!
§c[Villager] Our dairy supply! Leave her alone!
§c[Villager] We depend on those cows for milk and leather!
§c[Villager] Those cows are essential for our survival!
§c[Villager] That's weeks of milk you're threatening!
§c[Baby Villager] Don't hurt our cows! We need milk!
§c[Baby Villager] That cow gives us milk! *cries*
villagediplomacy.react.animalattack.hors: §c[Villager] Stop! We need that horse for travel!
§c[Villager] We use those horses for trade routes!
§c[Baby Villager] I want to ride horses when I grow up!
§c[Baby Villager] That horse is so pretty!
§c[Villager] Stop! Those pigs are for breeding!
§c[Villager] That pig will feed families this winter!
§c[Villager] Back off! That pig is reserved!
§c[Baby Villager] That pig makes funny noises!
§c[Baby Villager] I feed that pig every day!
villagediplomacy.react.animalattack.rabb: §c[Villager] Those rabbits are part of our ecosystem!
§c[Villager] What did that rabbit ever do to you!?
§c[Baby Villager] I want to pet them!
villagediplomacy.react.animalattack.shee: §c[Villager] Stop! We need that wool for blankets!
§c[Villager] Our textile supply! Leave her alone!
§c[Villager] Those sheep keep us warm in winter!
§c[Villager] We shear those sheep for clothes!
§c[Villager] That's our source of wool, brute!
§c[Baby Villager] That sheep makes our beds!
§c[Baby Villager] I like petting the sheep!
§c[Baby Villager] Leave the woolly one alone!
§c[Baby Villager] The sheep is so soft!
villagediplomacy.react.animaldeath.camel: §c[Villager] We needed that camel for DESERT TRAVEL!
§c[Villager] That took WEEKS to tame and breed!
§c[Villager] How will we cross the desert now!?
§c[Baby Villager] You killed the camel! NOOO! *screams*
§c[Baby Villager] That camel was so tall! *cries*
§c[Baby Villager] I wanted to ride him! *devastated*
villagediplomacy.react.animaldeath.chick: §c[Villager] That bird gave us eggs every morning!
§c[Villager] Small loss, big insult—why our livestock!?
§c[Villager] Feathers and eggs—both gone thanks to you.
§c[Baby Villager] The chicken! *cries* No more eggs!
§c[Baby Villager] That clucker was my friend! *sobs*
§c[Baby Villager] Why hurt the fluffy chicken!?
villagediplomacy.react.animaldeath.cow.a: §c[Villager] How will we feed our children without milk!?
§c[Villager] ANIMAL KILLER! That cow had calves!
§c[Villager] We raised that cow from birth!
§c[Villager] No milk, no cheese, no leather! Thanks to YOU!
villagediplomacy.react.animaldeath.cow.b: §c[Baby Villager] That cow had a calf! *cries*
§c[Baby Villager] Why!? She gave us milk! *heartbroken*
villagediplomacy.react.animaldeath.horse: §c[Villager] We needed that horse for TRAVEL!
§c[Villager] That took WEEKS to tame and breed!
§c[Villager] How will we transport goods now!?
§c[Villager] HORSE KILLER! That was our LIVELIHOOD!
§c[Villager] We used that horse for trade routes!
§c[Villager] That horse was part of the family!
§c[Villager] Killing a horse!? You have NO HEART!
§c[Baby Villager] You killed the horsie! NOOO! *screams*
§c[Baby Villager] That horse was so strong! *cries*
§c[Baby Villager] I wanted to ride him! *devastated*
villagediplomacy.react.animaldeath.pig.a: §c[Villager] You just killed our WINTER MEAT SUPPLY!
§c[Villager] We raised that pig for MONTHS!
§c[Villager] THIEF! That pig was our investment!
§c[Villager] How DARE you kill our livestock!?
§c[Villager] That pig was going to feed families!
villagediplomacy.react.animaldeath.pig.b: §c[Baby Villager] You killed the piggy! MONSTER! *cries*
§c[Baby Villager] That pig was going to have babies! *sobs*
§c[Baby Villager] Why!? He was so funny! *devastated*
§c[Baby Villager] I fed that pig carrots! *heartbroken*
villagediplomacy.react.animaldeath.rabbi: §c[Villager] That rabbit helped control garden pests!
§c[Villager] What kind of MONSTER kills rabbits!?
§c[Villager] You're a BRUTE and a BULLY!
§c[Baby Villager] That bunny was so cute! *sobs*
§c[Baby Villager] Why did you do that!? *devastated*
§c[Baby Villager] I wanted to pet the bunny! *heartbroken*
villagediplomacy.react.animaldeath.sheep: §c[Villager] That sheep produced wool for YEARS!
§c[Villager] How will we make blankets now!?
§c[Villager] That sheep was our textile source!
§c[Villager] MURDERER! We raised that sheep with care!
§c[Villager] No wool means no warm clothes!
§c[Villager] That sheep was white wool - RARE!
§c[Baby Villager] That sheep was so soft! *screams*
§c[Baby Villager] Why kill the woolly one!? *heartbroken*
§c[Baby Villager] I was going to shear her tomorrow! *devastated*
villagediplomacy.react.break.bed.adult.1: §c[Villager] Where am I supposed to sleep now!
§c[Villager] The straw still smelled like home...
villagediplomacy.react.break.bed.adult.3: §c[Villager] *furious* That took me weeks to make!
villagediplomacy.react.break.bed.adult.7: §c[Villager] I work all day and you break my bed!
villagediplomacy.react.break.bed.adult.8: §c[Villager] *indignant* I'll sleep on the floor because of you!
villagediplomacy.react.break.bed.baby.1: §c[Baby Villager] I need that to sleep!
villagediplomacy.react.break.bed.baby.3: §c[Baby Villager] Dad! My bed is broken!
villagediplomacy.react.break.bed.baby.5: §c[Baby Villager] The blanket was still warm...
villagediplomacy.react.break.bed.baby.6: §c[Baby Villager] Monsters come when beds break!
§4[Villager] NO! That was our warning bell!
§4[Villager] Every home listened for that ring!
§4[Villager] How will we call for help now!
§c[Villager] Raiders could attack and we wouldn't know!
villagediplomacy.react.break.bell.baby.1: §c[Baby Villager] Why did you break it!
villagediplomacy.react.break.bell.baby.5: §c[Baby Villager] I'm scared without the bell!
§c[Villager] Our food! You're destroying our crops!
§c[Villager] The whole village depends on these crops!
§c[Villager] I was going to harvest tomorrow!
§c[Villager] We'll go hungry because of you!
§c[Villager] Do you know how hard farming is!
§c[Villager] Those crops feed the whole village!
villagediplomacy.react.break.crop.baby.1: §c[Baby Villager] Mom said don't touch the crops!
villagediplomacy.react.break.crop.baby.3: §c[Baby Villager] Those were going to be bread!
villagediplomacy.react.break.crop.baby.4: §c[Baby Villager] The carrots had faces in my head...
§c[Villager] Hey! That made the village pretty!
§c[Villager] Show some respect for our village!
§7[Villager] Small joys matter in hard times.
§c[Villager] The festival lights were stored there!
villagediplomacy.react.break.house.adult: §c[Villager] The door still had my height marks!
§c[Villager] Rain is coming—where do I hide!?
§c[Villager] I built this with my own hands!
§c[Villager] This house protects me from monsters!
§c[Baby Villager] My toys were in the corner...
§c[Villager] How will we get water now!
§c[Villager] That well served us for generations!
§c[Villager] The bucket chain starts at dawn—ruined!
villagediplomacy.react.break.well.baby.0: §c[Baby Villager] *crying* Where do we get water!
villagediplomacy.react.break.well.baby.2: §c[Baby Villager] Mom! The water place is broken!
villagediplomacy.react.break.well.baby.3: §c[Baby Villager] The bucket was so heavy...
villagediplomacy.react.break.workstation: §c[Villager] Do you know how expensive those are!
§c[Villager] My whole profession depends on that!
§c[Villager] Years of stains on that wood—gone.
§4[Villager] The village economy needed that table!
§4[Villager] That's how I earn my living!
§4[Villager] *furious* How am I supposed to work now!
§4[Villager] That station was essential to the village!
§c[Villager] Without it I can't earn emeralds!
§c[Baby Villager] He carved his name underneath...
villagediplomacy.react.door.high.close.b: §a[Baby Villager] Mom taught me that too!
villagediplomacy.react.door.high.open.ba: §a[Baby Villager] Come in, you're the best!
§a[Baby Villager] Mom says you're really good!
villagediplomacy.react.door.high.open.da: §a[Villager] Our doors are open to you!
§a[Villager] Come in, make yourself at home!
villagediplomacy.react.door.high.open.mo: §a[Villager] Good morning! Our doors are always open to you!
villagediplomacy.react.door.high.open.ni: §a[Villager] Welcome, friend. Travel safe in the dark!
§a[Villager] Step in from the night, champion!
§a[Villager] Our home is yours, even at night!
villagediplomacy.react.door.low.adult.1: §6[Villager] I've got my eye on you...
villagediplomacy.react.door.neg.adult.0: §c[Villager] Get your hands off our doors!
villagediplomacy.react.door.neg.adult.8: §c[Villager] You have NO right to be here!
villagediplomacy.react.door.neg.adult.9: §c[Villager] I should call the Iron Golems!
villagediplomacy.react.place.anvil.unwel: §c[Villager] We don't trust you with an anvil!
§c[Villager] You'll forge arms to attack us!
§c[Villager] We don't want weapons in OUR village!
villagediplomacy.react.place.anvil.welco: §a[Villager] Your smithing will serve the village well!
villagediplomacy.react.place.bed.unwelco: §c[Villager] What do you think you're doing!?
§c[Villager] Hey! You're not welcome to build here!
§c[Villager] We don't want you living here!
§c[Villager] You can't just move in like that!
§c[Villager] Take that out of our village!
villagediplomacy.react.place.bed.welcome: §a[Villager] Feel free to rest here anytime.
§a[Villager] Your own bed! You're part of the village now.
§a[Villager] Glad to have you living with us!
villagediplomacy.react.place.bell.welcom: §a[Villager] A bell! That'll help coordinate everyone!
§a[Villager] Excellent! Now we can signal each other!
§a[Villager] You're thinking like a true villager!
§a[Villager] A bell for the community—thank you!
villagediplomacy.react.place.bookshelf.n: §e[Villager] A library! You like to read?
villagediplomacy.react.place.bookshelf.u: §c[Villager] Those books belong in OUR library!
§c[Villager] We know you can't even read!
villagediplomacy.react.place.bookshelf.w: §7[Villager] The children will love having books.
§6[Villager] A scholar! We're lucky to have you.
villagediplomacy.react.place.brewing.wel: §a[Villager] We could use someone with your skills!
villagediplomacy.react.place.cauldron.un: §c[Villager] What are you brewing in there!?
§c[Villager] We don't want dark magic here!
villagediplomacy.react.place.chest.unwel: §c[Villager] We don't want YOUR stuff here!
§c[Villager] Taking over our village, are you!?
§c[Villager] Don't think we won't check that!
villagediplomacy.react.place.composter.u: §c[Villager] That's for OUR crops, not yours!
villagediplomacy.react.place.crafting.un: §c[Villager] We have our OWN crafting tables!
§c[Villager] You're not part of this village!
§c[Villager] You're not welcome to craft here!
villagediplomacy.react.place.crafting.we: §a[Villager] The village benefits from your skills!
§d[Villager] I've never seen one up close!
§c[Villager] Dark magic! I knew you were trouble!
§c[Villager] That table gives me the creeps...
§a[Villager] This will make the village much stronger!
§d[Villager] A true mage among us—an honor!
§a[Villager] Your magic will protect us all!
villagediplomacy.react.place.furnace.wel: §a[Villager] A furnace! We could use more industry!
§a[Villager] You're really helping the village grow!
villagediplomacy.react.place.generic.unw: §c[Villager] You're not welcome to build here!
§c[Villager] Stop placing blocks in OUR village!
villagediplomacy.react.place.generic.wel: §a[Villager] Feel free to expand the village!
§a[Villager] You're part of the village now!
§7[Villager] Everyone can use that for repairs.
§a[Villager] Community tool stations are always welcome!
villagediplomacy.react.place.lectern.unw: §c[Villager] Who do you think you are, a teacher!?
villagediplomacy.react.place.lectern.wel: §6[Villager] A lectern! For reading and study!
§7[Villager] The mark of a true scholar.
§6[Villager] Will you share your knowledge with us?
§a[Villager] A lectern shows dedication to learning!
villagediplomacy.react.place.loom.unwelc: §c[Villager] Making YOUR banners in OUR village!
§c[Villager] We don't want your symbols here!
§c[Villager] Trying to mark this as YOUR territory!
villagediplomacy.react.theft.chest.adult: §c[Villager] I worked YEARS for what's in there!
§c[Villager] My life savings are in there!
§c[Villager] This is a breach of trust!
§c[Villager] You're no better than a pillager!
§c[Villager] I can't believe you're doing this!
§c[Villager] What do you think you're doing!?
§c[Baby Villager] *cries* Mommy! They're stealing our stuff!
§c[Baby Villager] Noooo! That's our family chest!
§c[Baby Villager] Daddy said strangers are dangerous!
§c[Baby Villager] My toys are in there!
§c[Villager] Our children will starve because of you!
§c[Villager] I worked HARD for those items!
§c[Villager] The Iron Golem will hear about this!
villagediplomacy.react.theft.loot.baby.0: §c[Baby Villager] *sobs* That was my favorite toy!
villagediplomacy.react.theft.loot.baby.1: §c[Baby Villager] No no no! Not our food!
villagediplomacy.react.theft.loot.baby.8: §c[Baby Villager] Why would you do that!? *cries*
villagediplomacy.react.theft.loot.baby.9: §c[Baby Villager] Mommy is going to be so mad!
villagediplomacy.react.trade.0: §a[Village Diplomacy] You completed %s trade(s)! The village appreciates your business.
villagediplomacy.react.trade.1: §a[Village Diplomacy] %s successful trade(s)! Your standing grows.
villagediplomacy.react.trade.2: §a[Village Diplomacy] Great trading! The villagers are pleased.
villagediplomacy.react.trade.3: §a[Village Diplomacy] %s trade(s) done. The village trusts you more.
villagediplomacy.react.trade.4: §a[Village Diplomacy] Good trade! The village values your business.
villagediplomacy.react.trade.5: §a[Village Diplomacy] %s trade(s) made—you're becoming a valued customer.
villagediplomacy.react.villagerdeath.adu: §c[Village Diplomacy] MURDER! The village witnessed your crime!
§c[Village Diplomacy] A villager died by your hand!
§c[Village Diplomacy] You took an innocent life!
villagediplomacy.react.villagerdeath.bab: §4[Village Diplomacy] You killed a CHILD! The village will NEVER forgive you!
§4[Village Diplomacy] MONSTER! You murdered an innocent child!
§4[Village Diplomacy] A baby... you killed a baby. Pure evil.
§4[Village Diplomacy] The village weeps—you killed one of their children.
villagediplomacy.rep.level.0: §4[Villager] *looks away in fear* Stay away from us!
villagediplomacy.rep.level.8: §6✦✦✦ [Villager] *kneels* A LEGEND walks among us! Everyone bow!§6✦✦✦
villagediplomacy.rep.notify.down.enemy: §c§l%s You are an enemy of the village!
villagediplomacy.rep.notify.down.untrade: §c§l%s Villagers refuse to trade with you!
villagediplomacy.rep.notify.title: §e§l         REPUTATION TIER CHANGED
villagediplomacy.rep.notify.up.hero: §a§l%s You are a hero to this village!
villagediplomacy.rep.notify.up.legend: §6§l%s The villagers bow to your presence!
villagediplomacy.sys.animal_release: §c[Village Diplomacy] You let village animals loose!
villagediplomacy.sys.bed_use: §c[Village Diplomacy] You used a villager's bed!
villagediplomacy.sys.bell_ring: §c[Village Diplomacy] You rang the village bell without cause!

villagediplomacy.sys.golem_hostile_timer: §4[Village Diplomacy] Iron golems are HOSTILE toward you for 30 seconds!
